Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.xprover.tests

Class ExtendedInputTests

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.seqprover.xprover.tests.XProverTests
org.eventb.core.seqprover.xprover.tests.XProverInputTests
org.eventb.core.seqprover.xprover.tests.ExtendedInputTests
public class ExtendedInputTests extends XProverInputTests
Tests with a reasoner using an extended input.

    final void
    failure()
    Ensures that the extended input reasoner can be run with a failure param.
    final void
    paramError()
    Ensures that the extended input reports an error for a wrong parameter, and the extended input reasoner thus fails.
    final void
    success()
    Ensures that the extended input reasoner can be run with a success param.
    final void
    timeoutError()
    Ensures that the extended input reports an error for a wrong timeout, and the extended input reasoner thus fails.
